title: citrus × bergamia
intro: Citrus × bergamia, also known as bergamot, is a hybrid citrus plant that is commonly cultivated for its distinctive and highly aromatic oil. The medicinal properties of bergamot are attributed to its high concentration of limonene, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of bergamot oil include reducing anxiety and stress, improving mood, and promoting better sleep, as well as its ability to aid in weight loss and lower cholesterol levels. Bergamot is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and supplements, and is commonly used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce symptoms of depression.
